title: Nutrition Science Advisory Committee: February 26, 2020 meeting agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Nutrition Science Advisory Committee (NSAC): Second Meeting Agenda
- Review and approve the Record of Proceedings from the inaugural meeting
- Discuss forward plan
- Discuss and provide advice on questions asked related to Health Canada's presentation on the Evidence Review Cycle for Dietary Guidance
Nutrition Science Advisory Committee Second Meeting, February 26, 2021.
Welcome & Declarations of Affiliations and Interests Presenters: NSAC Co-Chairs
- Welcome & Declarations of Affiliations and Interests
- Presenters: NSAC Co-Chairs

- Presenters: NSAC Co-Chairs
Setting the Stage: Discussion and Decision on Proposed Forward Plan Presenters: NSAC Co-Chairs

Health Canada Presentation: Evidence Review Cycle for Dietary Guidance used to inform the 2019 Canada's Food Guide Presenters: Dr. Alfred Aziz, Director General, Office of Nutrition Policy and Promotion, Health Canada, and Bryony Sinclair, Lead, Evidence Review Team, Office of Nutrition Policy and Promotion, Health Canada
- Health Canada Presentation: Evidence Review Cycle for Dietary Guidance used to inform the 2019 Canada's Food Guide
